$comment: Declarative dev-service MCP catalog (REQ-C-003). Adding a future dev-service MCP is a data-only change to this file — no generator-logic change required (REQ-C-004). Credentials are never bundled; only ${VAR}/<YOUR_KEY> placeholders appear anywhere in this catalog (REQ-C-005).

servers.name: playwright
servers.description: Browser automation via Playwright's accessibility tree (no vision model needed).

servers.name: supabase
servers.warning: Supabase MCP is intended for development and testing purposes only. Remember to never connect the MCP server to production data — enable read-only mode and project scoping (see https://supabase.com/docs/guides/ai-tools/mcp#security-risks).
servers.description: Manage Supabase projects, tables, config, and queries.

servers.name: vercel
servers.description: Search Vercel docs; manage projects, deployments, and logs.

servers.name: neon
servers.description: Manage Neon Postgres projects, branches, and queries via natural language.

local_alternative.$comment: Deprecated (verified 2026-07-11 via npm registry metadata: 'This package is deprecated. Use the remote MCP server at mcp.neon.tech instead.'). Retained only for reference — prefer the remote transport above.

servers.name: railway
servers.description: Manage Railway projects, services, and deployments.
servers.note: The historical npm package (@railway/mcp-server) is now a deprecated compatibility shim (verified 2026-07-11 via npm registry metadata). Prefer this remote OAuth server or the Railway CLI (railway mcp install / railway setup agent).

servers.name: claude-in-chrome
servers.description: Browser automation built into Claude Code. No .mcp.json server entry is generated for this catalog member — activate via Claude Code's own extension/settings.
